title: salix calyculata
intro: Salix calyculata, also known as the bundleflower or bundle willow, is a species of willow tree native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe sore throats and reduce fever. The health benefits of Salix calyculata include its ability to support the immune system and reduce inflammation, making it a popular remedy for colds, flu, and other respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
